Alright, introduction to goal setting. So I know that most of you have not done this before or if you have you felt pretty disorganized about it. And what I would like to say is that you were probably over complicating it and goal setting should be simple because things that are complicated don't stick and don't last. Okay and most OPE people do over complicate the heck out of this. How did they do that? They use really funky and unnatural language, talking about like simple rocks and waterfalls and crickets and I don't even know what. It's like if you need to translate what a goal means or what the the the term means and it's not gonna work guys. Two is they get way too specific with timelines. They're like cranking down to the day and they're saying there's no room for flexibility and they're very hard and strict on that right. And lastly is people get way too stressed about about the fact that you could make six goals for your company for the quarter and three of them could change. And I would like to bring you back to the concept of sunk cost which is that you shouldn't continue working towards a goal just because of the amount you've invested in it if it no longer makes sense for your business. Okay so I'm giving you permission to say hey you know if we're halfway through a quarter or a month or whatever and it makes sense that something else become the goal or the priority that it's totally at 100% okay and I would argue necessary to change it. Alright so don't be that person over complicates it keep it simple because a simple business will grow faster. So when you're setting your goals know the terminology which is very simple here okay. One is your critical number. What is your critical number for you as a gym? I would say that the minimal that you need as a critical number would be the number of EFTs you have okay because that is the lifeblood for your business that's your recurring revenue. From there you want to set out your one-year targets okay so I would say not only is it going to be EFTs you could include how many referrals you want from those EFTs you could create how many six weeks you want how many 42 days how many you know whatever right so thinking to get to this number of EFTs in one year what do I need to put into place to make that happen right and then those would be other numbers that you can use as yearly targets. Quarterly targets so when you are doing your quarterly planning that's going to be three to five items that can be done that provide the most clear and direct path to reaching your yearly goal okay and those typically take an entire quarter which is three or four months to accomplish and then breaking down your 30-day targets okay those are 30-day goals that indicate that you are on track to hit your quarterly targets so once you've broken down your yearly into things that you can do for a quarter you then break down the quarter into 30 days that's it that's how we run our business that's how I suggest you run yours I've tried higher level than that I've tried lower level than that this is what I feel is the minimal effective dose to work for planning okay
